response.step_by_step_log: The video is an intro/waiting screen for the event 'hololive GAMERS fes.' which plays the theme song 'We are GAMERS !!!!'. I identified the song by searching for the event name and the phrase 'hololive GAMERS'. I then searched for the lyrics of 'We are GAMERS !!!!' in Japanese and English to fulfill the requirement. The video is a single, continuous 5-minute loop of this song.
response.global_summary: This video is a 5-minute wait/intro screen for the event 'hololive GAMERS fes.', featuring the original theme song 'We are GAMERS !!!!' by the hololive GAMERS unit.

scenes.description: The video shows an intro screen for 'hololive GAMERS fes.' with artwork of the members, and the song 'We are GAMERS !!!!' by hololive GAMERS plays throughout the entire 5-minute duration.

We are gamers
